reviewer.evidencePolicy: Mark agent-status branch catalog claims satisfied only when top-level orientation branches and nested runner-readiness eval boundaries are both protected by deterministic tests.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names deterministic packet shape and branch-boundary behavior for agent status.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by runtime and app tests: top-level agent-status branches can expose safe setup, claim-state, and runner-smoke orientation while ready-runner eval stays nested under runnerReadiness rather than being promoted into first-touch nextBranches.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep agent-status branch catalog tests current when changing runner-readiness smoke or eval branch projection.
